item.title: Easy Homemade Boneless Wings
item.description: A simple homemade boneless wings recipe with a crispy, flavorful finish. Great for an easy chicken meal or game-day snack.

item.title: Chicken Stuffed Potato with Loaded Flavor

item.title: Peaches and Bourbon Make a Great Pair
item.description: A simple peach and bourbon recipe from Smokin' and Grillin' with AB, bringing together sweet fruit flavor and a warm, rich finish.
